figures.caption: Fig. 5. Round-100 accuracy gap relative to clean FedAvg. Negative values indicate degradation relative to ideal aggregation.
TABLE I POSITIONING OF REPRESENTATIVE OTA AGGREGATION APPROACHES. THE TABLE IS QUALITATIVE AND IS INTENDED TO CLARIFY MODELING SCOPE, NOT TO RANK PERFORMANCE.

Fig. 4. Late-round accuracy gap relative to clean FedAvg, ∆(m) t = Acc (m) t − AccFedAvg t . The gap view is useful because the raw accuracy curves are visually close in several settings. The dominant REED penalty appears under Fashion-MNIST with Dirichlet α = 0.3 heterogeneity.

Fig. 1. Overview of the proposed REED-enabled OTA-FL system. The server broadcasts the current global model to the clients, each client computes a local model increment, and REED maps the positive and negative parts of the update to paired orthogonal resource elements. The wireless uplink performs over-the-air superposition, while the server applies noncoherent energy detection and forms a signed aggregate by subtracting the two received energies. The resulting aggregate update is then used to produce the next global model.
